name: Mr Trials
short_description: Trials Bike Madness! Pull off stunts and as you try to pass each stage!
detailed_description:
Dive into Mr Trials, a single-player, physics-based platformer with charming blocky graphics that bring a playful, retro feel to every level. Navigate intricate obstacles and perform thrilling stunts in vibrant, pixel-inspired environments. Perfect for players who love the challenge of mastering unique mechanics in a visually fun and stylized world.

Features:

  • 50 Challenging Levels: Each level is designed to test your abilities with increasing difficulty. Unlock new stages and explore diverse environments that bring fresh twists to every challenge.

  • 5 Themed Worlds: Progress through themed worlds, each introducing new terrains, and environmental hazards. From desert dunes to icy peaks, each world demands a different strategy!

  • Golden Helmets: Outperform the regular score by hitting the highest stunt combos to earn the prestigious Golden Helmet on each level. Collect them all to show off your mastery!

  • Easy to Learn, Hard to Master: With intuitive controls, you'll jump, flip, and balance with ease—but true mastery requires skill and precision. Only the best can complete every level with a perfect score!

Are you ready to prove you’ve got what it takes to conquer every level, earn all the Golden Helmets, and become the ultimate stunt master in Mr Trials?
